description: Caddy PAUL framework: PLAN/AUDIT/APPLY/UNIFY phase orchestration loop (6 slash commands)

script: if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'git clone failed. Ensure you are added as a collaborator to meetcaddy/paul and your git CLI is authenticated (run: gh auth login).' }
if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Pop-Location; throw 'git checkout v0.1.0 SHA failed.' }

notes: PAUL framework files installed to: $(scoop prefix caddy-paul)\share\caddy-paul\
To activate in %USERPROFILE%\.claude\, run the caddy-link helper:
caddy-link ships with the caddy-frameworks meta-manifest:
Commands installed (type /paul: in Claude Code for the full menu):
Note: v0.1.0 ships init + register helpers plus the 4 core phase
commands. The 8 specialist subagents and paul-sdk CLI are scheduled
for v0.2.x; PAUL operates in degraded direct-model mode without them.
PREREQUISITE: requires GitHub collaborator access to meetcaddy/paul
(provisioned during Caddy onboarding) AND an authenticated git CLI
